paper.title: Fatigue behavior of SMA and HMA mixtures
paper.authors: F. Moghadas Nejad; E. Aflaki; M.A. Mohammadi
paper.notes: Reports fatigue, indirect tensile and stiffness behavior of asphalt mixtures, not cementitious compressive strength.

evidence.evidence_text: Title and abstract identify SMA/HMA asphalt mixtures and fatigue behavior under indirect tensile testing.

main_risks: No directly extractable cementitious mix-level compressive-strength data in supplied packet.
